ddt:Target.Name: N_P32M_AB-SRS_20080317
ddt:Target.Description:
1st: This XML file is for L53A DiagOnCAN Air Bag made by D.Yumoto at XX4. <<1.00>> P32M Nissan XX4 Daijirou YUMOTO d-yumoto@mail.nissan.co.jp <<1.01>> P32M 20 pieces of DTC were added at 20070410. NISSAN XX4 Daijirou YUMOTO <<1.02>> Data length or so were recorrected @20070531
I added request 'MemoryRead.Traceability' in requests tab. 2007/07/13 NISSAN XX4 D.Maeda<dmaeda@mail.nissan.co.jp> [2.17] Data length of 2102 is changed to 31 bytes. 2007/07/23 NISSAN XX4 D.YUMOTO
StartDiagnosticSession was added. StartDiagnosticSession.DefaultSession was added. StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagSession was added. TesterPresent.WithResponse was added. [[2.17]] 2007/8/23 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida
<<1.03>> ReplyBytes should begins with : $590F copy DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2 from generic DataBase copy ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage from generic DataBase suppress sent parameters in 21... requests 2008/3/17 RSM ECT SH Pang

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
As weight detect sensor comm failure
Bumper sensor open upper electric short
Bumper sensor line short upper GND short
Short circuit between DR1 and DR2
Right front seat pretensioner Electric short
Right front seat pretensioner GND short
Right front seat pretensioner line short
Left front seat pretensioner Electric short
Left front seat pretensioner GND short
Left front seat pretensioner line short
Short circuit between DR1 and DR2-2
Right seat side inflator Electric short
Right seat side inflator GND short
Right seat side inflator line short
Left seat side inflator Electric short
Left seat side inflator GND short
Left seat side inflator line short
Squib configration Error(An extra firing line is detected by the ECU)
Right seat curtain A/B inflator Open
Right seat curtain A/B inflator Electric short
Right seat curtain A/B inflator GND short
Right seat curtain A/B inflator line short
Left seat curtain A/B inflator Open
Left seat curtain A/B inflator Electric short
Left seat curtain A/B inflator GND short
Left seat curtain A/B inflator line short
Right front seat pretensioner 2 Electric short
Right front seat pretensioner 2 GND short
Right front seat pretensioner 2 line short
Right seat front curtain A/B Open
Right seat front curtain A/B Electric short
Right seat front curtain A/B GND short
Right seat front curtain A/B line short
Left seat front curtain A/B Open
Left seat front curtain A/B Electric short
Left seat front curtain A/B GND short
Left seat front curtain A/B line short
Right seat buckle SW Open Elctric short
Right seat buckle SW GND short
Left seat buckle SW Open Electric short
Left seat buckle SW GND short

Bumper sensor open upper electric short
Bumper sensor line short upper GND short

Right seat side inflator line short

Squib configration Error(An extra firing line is detected by the ECU)

Right seat front curtain A/B line short
Left seat front curtain A/B Open
Left seat front curtain A/B Electric short
Left seat front curtain A/B GND short
Left seat front curtain A/B line short
Right seat buckle SW Open Elctric short
Right seat buckle SW GND short
Left seat buckle SW Open Electric short
Left seat buckle SW GND short

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip
